raw_text: mateo sanchez a career summary as an aircraft systems engineer, juan carlos started his career in 2016 during his last university course and, from this day, his expectations have been high, as well as looking forward to make a good performance in the aviation field. he is actually working in eurofighter 2000 programme as a test systems engineer at airbus defence & space. previously, he made an internship as a mission systems engineer. juan carlos guarantee a highly qualified work in the engineering scope, with professional experience in design and modelling in avionic embedded systems (air to air/air to ground radar, hsi, armament system, altitude display indicator...) and integration in an aircraft mock-up. knowledge in arinc 429 and mil-std-1553 communication. he is fluent in a wide range of engineering tools, such as scade suite & display, mate/seas, doors, pba pro, rams plus, solidworks, fluent (ansys)... as well as diverse programming languages knowledge: c++, matlab, c#... experience may 2018- tests systems engineer, orbital critical systems (on behalf of airbus actually defence and space), getafe (madrid) [spain]. performed tasks: = mids communication system integration and test (tactical datalink in eurofighter 2000). = nato restricted itar habilitation. = hardware: mil-std-1553, lvt, test bench. = software: mate/seas, pba pro, doors, c++. may 2017- mission systems engineer internship, airbus defence and space, getafe may 2018 (madrid) [spain]. performed tasks: = design of hmi sytems using scade suite & display (esterel). = hmi modeling and integration in c101 mock-up: armament, radar, hsi, adi... = supporting the development of the tactical integrated mission system (tims) in a330- mrtt for france airforce: test bench simulation.
